summary: Solid playing by the band but the chaotic crowd and stray house lights marred the experience; recording quality is not described.
review: The reviewer notes that the musicians performed well despite the difficult circumstances, but the over‑capacity audience, fence‑jumpers, and the house lights being left on during the second set created a negative atmosphere. No details about the audio source or fidelity are provided, so the technical quality of the recording remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a mid‑range star rating; performance is praised but crowd/venue issues dominate, and there are no comments on audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type, so recording quality cannot be assessed beyond being average by default.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set was affected by house lights left on, which may have impacted the vibe; overall playing described as solid despite external disruptions.
